actions.script:
// Step 1: Create the hub record EntityValue newParty = ec.entity.makeValue("tutorial.party.Party") newParty.set("partyId", partyId) newParty.set("partyTypeEnumId", "PERSON") newParty.set("createdDate", ec.user.nowTimestamp) newParty.create()
// Step 2: Create the extension record EntityValue newPerson = ec.entity.makeValue("tutorial.party.Person") newPerson.set("partyId", partyId) newPerson.set("firstName", firstName) newPerson.set("lastName", lastName) newPerson.create()

// Step 1: Create the hub record (Notice the type is PARTY_GROUP) EntityValue newParty = ec.entity.makeValue("tutorial.party.Party") newParty.set("partyId", partyId) newParty.set("partyTypeEnumId", "PARTY_GROUP") newParty.set("createdDate", ec.user.nowTimestamp) newParty.create()
// Step 2: Create the organization extension record EntityValue newGroup = ec.entity.makeValue("tutorial.party.PartyGroup") newGroup.set("partyId", partyId) newGroup.set("groupName", groupName) newGroup.set("description", description) newGroup.create()

// Step 1: Create the floating Contact Method (The actual Email/Phone record) EntityValue newContact = ec.entity.makeValue("tutorial.party.ContactMech") newContact.set("contactMechId", contactMechId) newContact.set("contactMechTypeId", contactMechTypeId) newContact.set("infoString", infoString) newContact.set("createdDate", ec.user.nowTimestamp) newContact.create()
// Step 2: The Bridge Table - Tie the floating email/phone to the specific User or Group! EntityValue newLink = ec.entity.makeValue("tutorial.party.PartyContactMech") newLink.set("partyId", partyId) newLink.set("contactMechId", contactMechId) newLink.set("fromDate", ec.user.nowTimestamp) // We leave thruDate blank because the contact is currently active! newLink.create()
